items.title: Israel to intensify Lebanon offensive in bid to ‘crush’ Hezbollah
items.summary: PM Netanyahu said Israel will 'intensify' strikes, while the Israeli military said it was attacking the armed group.

items.title: Netanyahu says Israel will intensify strikes against Hezbollah
items.summary: The Israeli military hits targets in eastern Lebanon after the prime minister announces further strikes.

items.title: EU i Meksiko potpisali obnovljeni trgovinski sporazum
items.summary: EU I MEKSIKO potpisali su obnovljeni trgovinski sporazum s ciljem jačanja partnerstva, smanjenja ovisnosti o SAD-u i Kini te otvaranja novih tržišta za poljoprivredne i druge proizvode.

items.title: Bolivia’s president cuts salary in half amid protests
items.summary: Bolivian President Rodrigo Paz says he and his cabinet ministers will cut their salaries by 50 percent.

items.title: Trump pays tribute to US troops killed in war on Iran on Memorial Day
items.summary: US President Donald Trump marked Memorial Day at Arlington National Cemetery, paying tribute to US troops killed.

items.title: More than 1.5m foreign pilgrims begin Hajj despite Iran war fears
items.summary: Saudi Arabia says that is 11,000 more than the number of Muslims who travelled to the Gulf kingdom last year.

items.title: Ex-Scottish National Party chief pleads guilty to embezzling funds
items.summary: Peter Murrell admitted the offences at the High Court in Edinburgh after an investigation into the party's finances.

items.title: Trump dangles normalisation amid pro-Israel criticism of possible Iran deal
items.summary: US president says he is 'mandatorily requesting' that regional countries establish formal relations with Israel.

items.title: Žena (30) ubijena u pucnjavi u Velikoj Britaniji. Troje uhićenih
items.summary: ŽENA (30) ubijena je u pucnjavi ispred bara u Sheffieldu. Policija je uhitila dva muškarca i jednu ženu zbog sumnje na ubojstvo. Incident se dogodio u ranim jutarnjim satima blagdanskog ponedjeljka.

items.title: Lavrov najavio udare na Kijev, Americi rekao da evakuiraju dipomate
items.summary: RUSKI ministar Lavrov u razgovoru s američkim tajnikom Rubiom najavio je udare na 'centre odlučivanja' u Kijevu i pozvao SAD da evakuira svoje diplomatsko osoblje, kao odmazdu za ukrajinski napad.

items.title: THE KISWA: BEYOND THE CLOTH
items.summary: Every Muslim on earth has faced it in prayer. Billions have seen it in photos. Almost nobody knows its story.

items.title: Lopovi pratili sportaše preko Instagrama pa im upadali u kuće. Uhićeni su
items.summary: ČILEANSKA policija uhitila je trojac osumnjičen za seriju provala u domove sportaša u SAD-u i Argentini, uključujući Travisa Kelcea. Banda je pratila žrtve na društvenim mrežama.

items.title: Kyiv’s Chornobyl Museum devastated in overnight Russian missile attack
items.summary: Kyiv's Chornobyl Museum devastated in overnight Russian missile attack.

items.title: Father mourns daughter killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
items.summary: A six-year-old Palestinian girl was killed by an Israeli strike on a displacement camp in Khan Younis.

items.title: Lebanon marks Liberation Day under Israeli bombardment
items.summary: People in Lebanon have gathered to observe Liberation Day.

items.title: Potvrđen drugi slučaj hantavirusa u Španjolskoj
items.summary: POTVRĐEN je drugi slučaj zaraze hantavirusom među španjolskim putnicima s kruzera MV Hondius. Zaražena osoba već je bila u izolaciji. Preostalih 12 putnika ostaje u 42-dnevnoj karanteni u Madridu.

items.title: Rusija je našla opasan način da okrene NATO protiv Ukrajine
items.summary: RUSIJA elektroničkim ratovanjem preusmjerava ukrajinske dronove na teritorij NATO-a, stvarajući političke napetosti i prijeteći potpori Kijevu u baltičkim zemljama i Finskoj.

items.title: In Lebanon, everything and nothing has changed since 2000
items.summary: A local war has gone regional, drawing in Iran and the US, but its root cause is unchanged: Palestine.

items.title: Dvoje kupača poginulo u Francuskoj. Više od 30 ljudi spašeno iz mora
items.summary: DVOJE kupača poginulo je, a više od 30 spašeno na jugozapadu Francuske zbog jakih morskih struja. Vlasti upozoravaju na opasnost unatoč toplom vremenu koje privlači ljude na plaže.

items.title: Britanski regulator: Prijenosni punjači sve su veći rizik na letovima
items.summary: ZBOG rizika od pregrijavanja, britanski regulator poziva putnike da prijenosne punjače nose isključivo u ručnoj prtljazi na letovima.
